name: nimble_agents_generate
description:
Start creating a custom agent (initial creation only).

Use this tool ONLY for the first call that begins agent creation.
After this call, use nimble_agents_update_session for ALL follow-ups:
answering clarification questions, retrying errors, or refining the agent.

Workflow: generate (once) -> poll nimble_agents_status -> follow up via nimble_agents_update_session -> run -> publish.

Status flow:
- "waiting": Backend needs more info — relay the message to the user,
  then call nimble_agents_update_session with same session_id and their answer as prompt.
- "processing": Generation in progress — use nimble_agents_status to poll.
  Do NOT call this tool for status checks.
- "complete": Agent ready — agent_name is set, proceed to run/publish.
- "error"/"failed": Something went wrong — call nimble_agents_update_session with
  same session_id and a fix prompt referencing the error.

session_id.description: Unique conversation session ID. Generate a UUID on the first call (e.g. 'a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890'). Reuse this value when calling nimble_agents_update_session for follow-ups, nimble_agents_status for polling, and nimble_agents_publish to save.
session_id.title: Session Id

prompt.description: Natural-language instruction describing what the agent should collect (e.g. 'Collect product name, price, and rating from Amazon product pages'). Required on the first call. This tool is for initial creation only — use nimble_agents_update_session for all follow-ups (clarifications, retries, refinements).
prompt.title: Prompt

url.description: Example target URL that helps the generator understand page structure.
url.title: Url

output_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema object describing desired output fields.
output_schema.title: Output Schema

input_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema object describing runtime input parameters.
input_schema.title: Input Schema

status.description: Conversation state from API: waiting, processing, complete, or error. failed is used only for local/tool-level failures.
status.title: Status

session_id.description: Conversation session ID for conversational generate/publish flow. On first generate call, create a unique value (UUID-like recommended), then reuse the same value for all follow-up generate calls and publish.
session_id.title: Session Id

message.description: Question to answer, status update, or success message
message.title: Message

source_agent_name.description: Agent name currently being edited by the session.
source_agent_name.title: Source Agent Name

forked_from_agent_name.description: Original agent name when this session started from a fork.
forked_from_agent_name.title: Forked From Agent Name

outputSchema.description:
Response from nimble_agents_generate.

Uses conversational pattern:
- status="waiting"/"processing": Tool is asking a question (see message field)
- status="complete": Agent generated successfully
- status="error"/"failed": Error occurred (see error field)
outputSchema.title: AgentGenerateResult
